name: mcp-server-azure-devops
description: Azure DevOps integration for repository management, work items, and pipelines.

rating.reason: This toolset demonstrates good overall documentation quality with clear, descriptive tool names and comprehensive parameter documentation. Most tools have detailed descriptions explaining functionality and usage context (e.g., create_commit, get_pull_request_checks). Parameter descriptions are thorough with proper type constraints and examples. However, some tools have overly brief descriptions (e.g., get_me, list_organizations) that could benefit from more context about when to use them and what information they provide. The complex tools like create_commit excel with extensive documentation including usage examples and format specifications.
